what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets channel image asset named 'image (22)' located under icons/; it stores metadata such as id, address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, timestamps, alt text, and links rather than executable code.
observations: The asset is an image/png with recorded width and height of 0.
It has a single version (v1) referencing blob://b2:f90434ce314af48cd82e6f7ad03337a6.
The alt text is empty and the links list is empty.
Source is 'dragnet' and the author is identified by session 'ch-3mpkjg3r'.
Created and updated timestamps are identical, indicating no subsequent edits.
No code symbols are present in the file.
standouts: Recorded dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image record.
Single immutable version with empty alt text and no outgoing links.
Sourced via dragnet with a session-scoped author identifier.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata.
Follows a channel-memory ledger format with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, versions, and links fields.
Encodes the asset path into the filename using double underscores.
concerns: Width and height are zero, which may mean dimensions were not captured or the record is a placeholder.
Alt text is empty, which could reduce accessibility if used for UI assets.
No links or provenance beyond a dragnet source and session id.
notes: A single-version, dimensionless PNG icon ledger entry from the design-assets channel with minimal metadata.
questions: Why are the width and height recorded as 0 for an image asset?
Is the empty alt text intentional or simply unset?
What does 'dragnet' as a source imply about how the asset was ingested?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an image asset; it does catalog it, but the missing dimensions and empty alt text make the record less informative than a typical asset ledger entry.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to create a persistent, versioned ledger entry for a design asset so it can be referenced by address and blob in a channel-memory system.
contribution: Provides a concrete, addressable metadata record for a design-assets icon, including a stable blob reference and authorship/timestamp provenance that a fused system could use to locate or audit the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger record for a design-assets PNG icon named 'image (22)' with a single version, blob reference, zero recorded dimensions, empty alt text, and dragnet ingestion provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a design-assets icon image so it can be referenced by address and blob within the channel-memory ledger.
